purpose: Weak-point debate stock: explain intent (model 0/4) and English (0.57 vs ja 0.79). Diverse, boundary-aware English/explain themes to lift the learned model's weak areas. Human review required before any training use.

topics.theme: In English, a user asks why adding an index sped up a slow query. Route to explain (mechanism/cause), not respond (one-line fact) and not verify.
desired_discussion: produce short self-contained user-utterance samples (not debate prose)
positive-fire counterpart and a suppressor (false-positive) counterpart

topics.theme: English: 'Help me understand how OAuth refresh tokens actually work.' Route to explain, not respond.

positive-fire counterpart and a suppressor (false-positive) counterpart
